# TASK008 - Sync Phase 035 Plan 16 Closeout Continuity

**Status:** Completed
**Added:** 2026-04-13
**Updated:** 2026-04-13

## Original Request

Continue Phase 035 truthfully after Plan 16 execution, write the missing Plan
16 closeout artifact, and synchronize the planning plus memory-bank surfaces so
they stop claiming the repository is still on the pre-Plan-16 handoff state.

## Thought Process

The product-code work for the final stealth-additions slice was already done,
but the closeout surfaces still pointed at `035-16-PLAN.md` as the next active
step. The correct move was to avoid the unrelated `035-a*` planning rename
wave, reopen the live Plan 16 execution truth, write the missing
`035-16-SUMMARY.md`, advance `.planning` from Plan 16 to Plan 17, and refresh
the memory-bank dashboard so a future session inherits the real handoff state.

## Implementation Plan

- Reopen the Phase 035 Plan 16 truth and reconfirm the next handoff target
- Write the missing `035-16-SUMMARY.md` from repository-backed receive-path and
  acceptance evidence
- Advance `.planning/STATE.md`, `.planning/ROADMAP.md`, and
  `.planning/phases/035-mix2-fixes/035-TODO.md` to the post-Plan-16 truth
- Refresh memory-bank continuity files so they point at `035-17-PLAN.md`

## Progress Log

### 2026-04-13

- Reconfirmed that Plan 17, not Plan 18, is the truthful next active handoff
  after the Plan 16 stealth closeout
- Added the missing `035-16-SUMMARY.md` so the final stealth-additions slice is
  now repository-backed continuity instead of implied chat state
- Marked `035-38`, `035-39`, and `035-40` complete in `035-TODO.md` and

- Advanced `.planning/STATE.md` and `.planning/ROADMAP.md` from stale Plan 16

- Refreshed the memory-bank dashboard and progress files so future sessions
  inherit the Plan 16 closure and the correct next-step continuity without
